overall.description: A first-person perspective walk up a neon-lit concrete staircase in a cyberpunk urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene features vibrant magenta and cyan lighting, large digital advertisements, and progresses from a ground-level underpass to an upper landing where an NPC stands near a billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass entrance with large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to climb a wide concrete staircase beneath an overhead walkway, passing a large illuminated MIXIT advertisement

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertisement displaying a purple beverage can with MIXIT branding and 16 FL OZ text
tall gray concrete wall with metal railing on top, separating the walkway from the street level
dark concrete overpass or walkway spanning above the staircase entrance
illuminated directional sign with arrows pointing toward City Center

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of a concrete staircase in a cyberpunk urban setting. A large glowing MIXIT advertisement dominates the right side while a concrete retaining wall lines the left. The camera moves forward toward the stairs beneath an overhead bridge structure, with neon purple and cyan lighting illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairwell with vibrant magenta and cyan neon lighting

events.description: enters the enclosed stairwell passage with walls closing in on both sides and intense purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the concrete stairs through a narrow corridor illuminated by vibrant magenta neon strips on the right wall

entered.detail: brightly lit magenta-colored wall running alongside the staircase with vertical neon strips
curved architectural ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures creating a tunnel effect
tall digital display panels mounted on the left wall showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends into a narrow, covered stairwell bathed in intense magenta and cyan neon light. The right wall glows purple with vertical lighting strips, while the left side features vertical advertisement screens. The space feels enclosed and tunnel-like as the camera climbs higher, leaving the ground-level billboard behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stair landing with bright advertisement screens

events.description: a person becomes visible standing at the top landing near a bright white advertisement screen

agents.ego_description: approaching the top of the staircase where a lone figure stands near an illuminated billboard, preparing to exit the stairwell

notable_agents.action: standing still at the top landing facing the advertisement screen, wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: large illuminated white and blue billboard displaying text and graphics at the stair landing
architectural opening at the top of the stairs leading to the upper level walkway

segments.scene_description: As the camera nears the top of the staircase, the purple walls give way to a brighter landing area. A bright white advertisement screen dominates the left side, where a lone NPC stands facing the display. The environment opens slightly as the camera approaches the exit archway, transitioning from the enclosed neon stairwell to the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a dim urban underpass into a brightly lit upper landing within a cyberpunk cityscape. It begins at the base of a concrete staircase, moving forward beneath an overhead bridge where a glowing MIXIT advertisement and neon purple and cyan lights define the ground level. As the camera climbs, the environment narrows into an enclosed, tunnel-like stairwell bathed in intense magenta light and lined with vertical advertisement screens. The scene then opens up as the camera nears the top, where the saturated purple walls give way to a brighter landing area. Finally, the camera approaches an exit archway and a large white advertisement screen where a lone NPC stands, completing the transition from the claustrophobic neon corridor to the open upper level.
